seoTitle: Sherwood vs Shoal Point — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Sherwood and Shoal Point. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Sherwood vs Shoal Point: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Sherwood and Shoal Point.
heading: Sherwood vs Shoal Point — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Sherwood, Queensland and Shoal Point, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Shoal Point has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Sherwood (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Sherwood or Shoal Point safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Sherwood has a flood risk score of 25/100, while Shoal Point scores 41/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Sherwood scores 58/100 for bushfire risk. Shoal Point scores 22/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Sherwood or Shoal Point?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Shoal Point has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.48% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
